examples: The committee came up with some interesting recommendations
A slight unpleasantness arose from this discussion

meanings.definition: move toward, travel toward something or somebody or approach something or somebody
examples: He came singing down the road
Come with me to the Casbah
come down here!
come out of the closet!
come into the room
a question arose
The fog lifted
The smoke arose from the forest fire
The mist uprose from the meadows
These names came up in the discussion
the lights went on
the computer came up

meanings.definition: get something or somebody for a specific purpose
examples: I found this gadget that will serve as a bottle opener
I got hold of these tools to fix our plumbing
The chairman got hold of a secretary on Friday night to type the urgent letter
The sun also rises
The sun uprising sees the dusk night fled...
Jupiter ascends

meanings.definition: gather (money or other resources) together over time
examples: She had scraped together enough money for college
they scratched a meager living
muster the courage to do something
she rallied her intellect
Summon all your courage
